must_answer: 这张卡在考什么知识点
用户要做什么交互动作
解析如何让用户感觉这对过级有帮助

field_semantics.front: first visible content, using mixed exam context and knowledge-point signaling when needed
field_semantics.analysis: why this matters for passing the exam
field_semantics.audio: resource medium that can be front content for listening cards and some other cards when needed; it does not autoplay and front-side subtitles are absent by default
field_semantics.auto_scoring: whether the system can score directly
field_semantics.space_metadata: physical-space related metadata, including card position or form changes if needed

interaction_contract_rule: if a new interaction changes how cards must be authored, it must be added to interactions spec before use
audio_usage_rule: audio may appear through existing core interactions without creating an audio-specific interaction family
audio_presentation_rule: front side does not autoplay audio and does not require subtitles; back side may contain text or transcript when useful
